vec_ceil_kernel.prompt: Apply CEIL element-wise to vector A into C. Arguments in order: input pointer A, then output pointer C. Single block of exactly 256 elements (tensor<256xf32>). No program_id, no masking. Use math.ceil.

vec_sum3_kernel.prompt: Add three vectors A, B and C element-wise into output D. Arguments in order: input pointer A, input pointer B, input pointer C, then output pointer D. Single block of exactly 256 elements (tensor<256xf32>). No program_id, no masking. Load A, B, C; arith.addf A and B; arith.addf that with C; store to D.

vec_max3_kernel.prompt: Element-wise MAXIMUM of three vectors A, B, C into output D. Arguments in order: input pointer A, input pointer B, input pointer C, then output pointer D. Single block of exactly 256 elements (tensor<256xf32>). No program_id, no masking. arith.maximumf A and B, then arith.maximumf that with C, store to D.

vec_min3_kernel.prompt: Element-wise MINIMUM of three vectors A, B, C into output D. Arguments in order: input pointer A, input pointer B, input pointer C, then output pointer D. Single block of exactly 256 elements (tensor<256xf32>). No program_id, no masking. arith.minimumf A and B, then arith.minimumf that with C, store to D.

vec_negmul_kernel.prompt: Compute -(A * B) element-wise into C. Arguments in order: input pointer A, input pointer B, output pointer C. Single block of exactly 256 elements (tensor<256xf32>). No program_id, no masking. Steps: arith.mulf A and B; then arith.negf of the product; store to C.

vec_prod3_kernel.prompt: Multiply three vectors A, B, C element-wise into output D. Arguments in order: input pointer A, input pointer B, input pointer C, then output pointer D. Single block of exactly 256 elements (tensor<256xf32>). No program_id, no masking. arith.mulf A and B, then arith.mulf that with C, store to D.
